query: Find 10 parcels in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class, sorted by teigid ascending.

1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Trondheim municipality

3.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons for the high risk class (filtered by class)

4.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to those that intersect Trondheim municipality

6.description: find parcels that intersect reduced quick-clay polygons

7.description: collapse to one row per teigid
